phase_title: Internal Scopes, Service Identity and Audit Foundation
activation_note: The project owner approved Gate 1, but the configured Neon database cannot be independently verified as non-production because no explicit development/test marker is present. Schema and migration preparation may be reviewed; migration apply is paused.

last_result.review_evidence: P0-SEC-B completion commit published fast-forward with focused 10/10, API 921/921, typecheck/build, empty Prisma diff, and no production network.
last_result.selected_reason: Shared-token role/scope/expiry/revocation/audit findings require persisted service identity and migration.
last_result.database_verification: failed: Neon host with no explicit development/test marker or development-named database
last_result.migration_sql_review: additive only; no DROP TABLE, DROP COLUMN, TRUNCATE, destructive rename, or data rewrite
